subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, before Whom all the peoples of the world - the learned, the mystics, the eminent, and the rulers - stand in reverence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را سزاوار که جمیع اهل عالم از علما و عرفا و فضلا و امرا بر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @creation of the world
